title: make --format columnizing consistent with buildah images
body:
closes #2016 

It feels great to contribute again after long time. :grinning:

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

Can you fix the man pages for buildah containers to match the new format?
bot, add author to whitelist

LGTM
@rhatdan I took a quick look at the man pages and I think they're good as is.  Your call.
The man pages that use the --format flag are showing no headers, after this patch, they will show headers, I believe.

@rhatdan unless "table" is specified in the beginning of "format" no header is shown:

```
$ ./buildah containers -a --format "{{.ContainerName}} :: {{.ContainerID}}"
pg               ::   44288fe4f8325bec974f79f3394d276504c5e5a174505acd167bfb7acc9485b4
upbeat_tu        ::   8a05d1de192932eb75cb0e7c54e49532707eec5d493b4818785ce9dbddfc517a

$ ./buildah containers -a --format "table {{.ContainerName}} :: {{.ContainerID}}"
CONTAINER NAME   ::   CONTAINER ID
pg               ::   44288fe4f8325bec974f79f3394d276504c5e5a174505acd167bfb7acc9485b4
upbeat_tu        ::   8a05d1de192932eb75cb0e7c54e49532707eec5d493b4818785ce9dbddfc517a

```

:pushpin: Commit c411b91 has been approved by `rhatdan`
